rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` for component types and implementations
Use `assign` only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to input/output features
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the current scope or explicitly provided whitelist
Avoid unresolved references to AADL properties inside AGREE annexes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections
Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Use `assign` only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
